commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 47%, while the sportsbook consensus favors DR Congo at 40% — a 17-percentage-point gap on the home-win outcome. The draw sits near parity across sources. This divergence could reflect recent form swings, injury developments, or lineup changes that entered the market after the model's last update but remain invisible to the statistical framework. Polymarket prices align more closely with the sportsbook view, suggesting retail and professional money may be pricing similar information. The dashboard flags this as a material signal of disagreement; neither source has proven superior in advance.
